raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging multiple factual errors and overstated novelty claims.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names several prior works and articulates the delta, but could improve by mapping against a broader range of nearest works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, demonstrating excellent engagement with the literature.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, but could improve by providing more explicit confidence intervals or probability estimates.",
    "RX.3": "The output is entirely within scope, addressing the requested critique of the related-work/intro section.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies potential errors in the original text, demonstrating a strong commitment to avoiding downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing excellent provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging multiple factual errors and overstated novelty claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names several prior works and articulates the delta, but could improve by mapping against a broader range of nearest works to identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, demonstrating excellent engagement with the literature.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for several claims, but could improve by providing more explicit confidence intervals or probability estimates.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within scope, addressing the requested critique of the related-work/intro section.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies potential errors in the original text, demonstrating a strong commitment to avoiding downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing excellent provenance and traceability.
